title: MONSTA X: CONNECT x in CINEMAS
overview: In July 2025, MONSTA X set the KSPO DOME ablaze over three unforgettable days with their show 2025 MONSTA X CONNECT X. From the powerful live band session and a setlist packed with spectacular performances, to never-before-seen behind-the-scenes footage of the preparation process, and exclusive, heartfelt interviews where the members reflect on their intense 10-year journey—this film captures it all. A chronicle of a decade-long story written together by MONSTA X and MONBEBE.
